member.name: M:nxm.documents.office.spreadsheet.set_style(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: set cell style (from previously defined by using define_style)

member.name: T:nxm.documents.office.spreadsheet_document
member.summary: spreadsheet implementation using Excel compatible files/streams

member.name: M:nxm.documents.office.spreadsheet_document.save_document
member.summary: saves document in its current location

member.name: M:nxm.documents.office.spreadsheet_document.save_document_to(System.IO.Stream,nxm.documents.spreadsheet.spreadsheet_save_options)
member.summary: saves document into given output stream

member.name: M:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.spreadsheet_tools.read(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary:
read content of given spreadsheet file into collection of array-variants
note: dispose when finished!
